title: Vercel Open Source Program: Spring 2026 cohort
summary: Vercel Open Source Program: Spring 2026 cohort
whyItMatters: The world runs on open source software. The frameworks, libraries, and tools we rely on are made possible by communities that share ideas and build in the open. At Vercel, we want to help those communities thrive. That’s why we run the Vercel Open Source Program : a developer initiative that gives maintainers the resources and support they need to keep ship…
